title: Easy Fish Cakes
excerpt: Ingredients 300 g stockfish fillets (hake), skinned about 100 ml water 4 slices bread, broken into pieces 1 beaten egg 10 ml lemon juice salt and pepper 300 ml finely chopped parsley finely grated zest of one orange extra soft, fresh breadcrumbs (or cake flour), if needed Method Poach the fish until done in …
html:
Ingredients

  • 300 g stockfish fillets (hake), skinned
  • about 100 ml water
  • 4 slices bread, broken into pieces
  • 1 beaten egg
  • 10 ml lemon juice
  • salt and pepper
  • 300 ml finely chopped parsley
  • finely grated zest of one orange
  • extra soft, fresh breadcrumbs (or cake flour), if needed

Method

Poach the fish until done in the water. Put the bread in a bowl and drain the poaching water over it.

Pat the fish dry with kitchen paper and flake. Remove any bones you come across.

Crumble the bread in with the fish and add the rest of the ingredients. Mix well.

If the mixture is too loose to shape, add a few spoons of crumbs or flour until it's workable.

With your hands, shape medium-sized fish cakes and fry in shallow oil until golden brown.

Makes 4 servings with mashed potatoes and/or a lovely fresh salad.

Easy!
